title: Create: potato cannon enchantments fix
description: A simple Create mod addon that implements PR#10080 by BarkNMeow through some quick and dirty Mixins. Fixes the Punch, Power and Flame enchantments having no effect on the potato cannon (as reported in issue #8030).
body:
A simple Create mod addon that implements [PR10080](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create/pull/10080) through some quick and dirty Mixins.

Fixes the Punch, Power and Flame enchantments having no effect on the potato cannon (as reported in issue [#8030](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create/issues/8030)).

With this fix, a properly enchanted Potato Cannon with well selected ammo is the beast it should always have been.

Does not fix the other vanilla enchantement issues present with Create gear.
